# infomaniak_public_cloud_openrc (Data Source)

Reads the `openrc.sh` authentication file for a Public Cloud user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "infomaniak_public_cloud_openrc" "this" {
  public_cloud_id         = 1234
  public_cloud_project_id = 5678
  public_cloud_user_id    = 42
  region                  = "pub1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `public_cloud_id` (Number) Identifier of the parent Public Cloud product.
- `public_cloud_project_id` (Number) Identifier of the parent project.
- `public_cloud_user_id` (Number) Identifier of the user.

### Optional

- `region` (String) Target region (`pub1` or `pub2`). Defaults to `pub1` server-side.

### Read-Only

- `content` (String, Sensitive) Raw content of the `openrc.sh` file.
